name: Rolling V Bus Corp
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); Passengers; Authorized For Passenger
entity_status: active (acquired by Beacon Mobility 11/1/2023; continues to operate)
registry_source: NY Department of State Division of Corporations (entity not directly fetched); company history confirmed by River Reporter and Sullivan County Democrat
notes: Founded 1979 by Eddie and Tony Vallone; family-owned by Vallone and DeSabato families until 11/1/2023 sale to Beacon Mobility. Phil and Nick Vallone remain in management. Mailing address routed to Beacon Mobility HQ: 3700 Embassy Pkwy Ste 500, Akron, OH 44333. Origins trace to Pioneer Bus Corporation (formed 1954 from merger of Parkway, Columbia, and Syken bus services). USDOT match strong - address (Liberty/South Fallsburg) and state match. 24-month US inspections: 16 (1 OOS, 6.2%); crashes: 6 (0 fatal, 4 injury, 2 tow-away). 2023 mileage: 3,730,000.
